title: Norse Adventure
description:
Go viking in Minecraft!
A Minecraft datapack adding viking ships.
body: # Norse Adventure Go viking in Minecraft! To get started, simply install the both the **datapack** and **resourcepack** and once in-game, check the advancments tab for guidance. Should you encounter any bugs, please report them on GitHub or let me know, either in the comments or by email at hexuar@gmail.com. ## Karve An all purpose vessel used for fishing, trading and transport. ## Knarr A trading vessel with lots of storage. ## Skeid A raiding and war ship, able to carry a large amount of warriors.
